description: Per-channel DEEP record for Phases 4 (HL7 behaviour), 5 (OpenEyes API usage) and 6 (auth / persisted-login). One JSON array per instance batch at deepdive/_slices/<instance>.json. Requires reading the transformer JavaScript and connector config, not just structure. Every non-trivial field must be backed by an evidence[] entry.

hl7.is_hl7: true if the channel parses or emits HL7v2, else false

field_map.target: OE/PASAPI field or request param e.g. hos_num / PatientIdentifier

calls.payload_shape: short description of the body built

auth.credential_source: connector field | configurationMap:<key> | globalMap:<key> (NEVER the value)

keys: globalMap/globalChannelMap keys read or written for auth/session
session_persistence.relogin_trigger: what forces a re-auth (401, expiry, per-message), or na

channel_writer_targets: downstream channel name or id, for cross-channel dataflow
